descriptionTemplate: Deal 25% of each enemy's Max HP as {Fixed DMG}, with a minimum DMG equal to [Arg1]% of your Max HP. After use, "Doll: Inferno"'s specific skills switch to {Finale Form}. The effect of {Illusion's End} activates only once.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Deal 30% of all enemies' Max HP as {Fixed DMG}. This DMG will not be less than [Arg1]% of your Max HP. Restores 30% of lost HP. After use, "Doll: Inferno"'s specific skills switch to {Finale Form}. The effect of {Illusion's End} activates only once.
